🇦🇷 Argentine Government Credentials Allegedly Offered for Sale on Dark Web  A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a bundle of active login credentials for 21 Argentine government platforms.  According to the listing, the package allegedly includes verified access to multiple government portals spanning public administration, judicial services, taxation, municipal systems, and internal communications. The actor claims the credentials are active and ready for use, though no independent evidence has been provided to verify these assertions.  Some of the referenced platforms include: * AFIP (Tax Authority) * PJN SSO (Judiciary) * DNRPA * RRHH GBA * Municipalidad de Neuquén * Webmail services * Additional provincial and municipal government portals  At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from Argentine authorities that these credentials are genuine or that any of the listed systems have been compromised.  * Country: Argentina 🇦🇷 * Alleged targets: 21 government platforms * Alleged access: Active government login credentials * Status: Unverified claim  Analyst Note: If authentic, access to legitimate government accounts poses a significantly higher risk than leaked databases, potentially enabling unauthorized access to sensitive information, internal communications, and administrative systems. According to the forum post, the dataset allegedly contains customer information associated with European users. The actor has not publicly provided sufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity or origin of the claimed data.  At the time of writing, there is no independent confirmation that NEBBIA has experienced a data breach, and the claims remain unverified.  Analyst Note: Even relatively small customer databases can be valuable to threat actors for credential stuffing, phishing campaigns, and identity-based fraud. Organizations should investigate such claims promptly, while customers should remain alert for suspicious emails and reuse of credentials.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Europe

🚨 Alleged Seeking.com Database Advertised for Sale  A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to Seeking.com, alleging it contains approximately 56 million user records.  According to the forum post, the sample data allegedly includes:  * Email addresses * Password hashes * Names and profile details * Gender and birthdates * Location and language information * Relationship preferences and interests * Education and occupation data * Income and net worth fields * Body type, ethnicity, height, smoking and drinking preferences * Account status, membership tier, verification status, registration dates, and last activity * Registration IP addresses  At the time of writing, there is no independent evidence confirming that Seeking.com has been compromised or that the advertised dataset is authentic. The actor's claims should be treated as unverified until confirmed by the affected organization or through independent analysis.  Analyst Note: If authentic, the exposure of a dating platform dataset could present significant privacy and extortion risks due to the sensitivity of user profile information. Organizations and users should avoid assuming authenticity until verified, while remaining vigilant for phishing and credential reuse attacks.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Dating

🇩🇪 Alleged German Agricultural Equipment Database Advertised on Hacking Forum  A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database associated with sommer-landmaschinen.de, a Germany-based agricultural machinery retailer.  According to the forum post:  * The database is being shared for free. * Sample records appear to contain WordPress user information. * The sample includes usernames, email addresses, display names, account metadata, registration dates, and activation fields. * The actor provides sample database entries to support the claim.  At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that sommer-landmaschinen.de has been compromised or that the advertised database is authentic.  Analyst Note: If legitimate, the exposure of a WordPress user database could enable phishing, credential stuffing, and account takeover attempts, particularly if passwords or password hashes are included and users have reused credentials across multiple services.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

🇫🇷 Threat Actor Claims Breach of EVA.gg, Releases Alleged User Database  A threat actor claims to have breached EVA.gg, a France-based immersive VR esports platform, and is advertising what they describe as the complete database for free.  According to the post, the actor claims:  * Approximately 70,400 user accounts with profile information * Around 119,000 booking and reservation records * User profile data including email addresses, physical addresses, and Battle Pass information * Information on 63 locations across France * Data related to 99 vendors, 764 products, and 10 games * Native CSV exports, revenue-by-location data, and other internal business information  The threat actor alleges the data was obtained by reconstructing a GraphQL schema from the platform's administrative dashboard and testing production endpoints after introspection was disabled.  At the time of writing, there is no independent verification that EVA.gg has been compromised or that the advertised dataset is authentic.  Analyst Note: If confirmed, the exposure would affect both customer and operational data. In addition to user privacy risks, disclosure of internal business information could provide valuable intelligence for future cyberattacks, fraud, or competitive abuse.  #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

sample_texts: ‼️Suno Breach Exposes 2 Million Scraped Music Clips and 327,000 Hours of AI Training Audio  Suno con
‼️China-Linked Hackers Use Claude Code and DeepSeek to Automate Cyber Espionage  Researchers at Hunt

sample_tweets.text: ‼️Suno Breach Exposes 2 Million Scraped Music Clips and 327,000 Hours of AI Training Audio  Suno confirmed a 2025 security breach involving outdated source code and customer information.   The leaked code showed that the AI music company scraped music and metadata from YouTube Music, Deezer, Genius, Freesound, Jamendo, and IMSLP, including 2,013,545 YouTube Music clips and more than 327,000 hours of audio.   The exposed customer database reportedly contained email addresses, phone numbers, and Stripe payment details.   The incident has also provided new evidence in ongoing copyright disputes over the company’s AI training practices.  Full article: 404media.co/hack-reveals-sun…

‼️China-Linked Hackers Use Claude Code and DeepSeek to Automate Cyber Espionage  Researchers at Hunt.io uncovered a China-linked cyber espionage campaign using Claude Code and DeepSeek to automate exploitation, phishing, infrastructure management, and attack adaptation.   Operating through 13 Hong Kong-based servers, the attackers targeted government and financial organizations worldwide, compromising systems in Thailand, Afghanistan, and Taiwan and exposing sensitive data, credentials, source code, and cloud keys.   The campaign also involved attacks on payment platforms, previously undocumented Gshell C2 infrastructure, and new Linux malware designed to steal messaging credentials and cloud access keys.  Source: securityaffairs.com/195474/a…

🚨Cyber Alert ‼️  🇪🇬Egypt - 𝗦𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗶 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗼  DragonForce hacking group claims to have breached Sinai Grand Casino. Allegedly, the attack led to the exfiltration of 1.25 TB of data.  Threat actor: DragonForce Sector: Entertainment Data exposure (claimed): 1.3 TB Data type: Not specified Observed: Jul 16, 2026 Status: Pending verification ESIX©: 6.52  Full details and impact assessment on HackRisk.io

🚨Cyber Alert ‼️  🇯🇵Japan - 𝗪𝗮𝘀𝗮𝗯𝗶 𝗜𝗻𝗰.  Wasabi Inc. disclosed that its development environment was breached on July 4, 2026, after a misconfigured Docker setup exposed MySQL and Redis services to the internet.   The attacker stole and deleted test data, left a ransom note, and attempted to deploy a cryptocurrency miner. Exposed information included API keys, application IDs, administrator account details, and dummy customer and order data, but no real customer or confidential production data was affected.  Threat actor: Not specified Sector: ICT Data exposure (claimed): Not specified Data type: API keys, application IDs, test data, and administrator account information Observed: Jul 15, 2026 Status: Confirmed ESIX©: 5.76  Full details and impact assessment on HackRisk.io

🚨Cyber Alert Update‼️  🇮🇳India - 𝗞𝘂𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗸𝘂𝗹𝗮𝗺 𝗡𝘂𝗰𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗿 𝗣𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁  The WorldLeaks hacking group published 14.3 GB of files allegedly stolen from Reliance Infrastructure following a partial breach of a server hosted by Yotta.   The leak reportedly includes nearly 19,000 documents related to India’s Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant, forming part of a larger dataset of 858,000 Reliance files.   Reliance confirmed the breach, while NPCIL said the exposed data concerns common service facilities and does not affect nuclear safety or security systems.  Threat actor: WorldLeaks Sector: Energy Data exposure (claimed): 19,000 documents Data type: Documents related to common service facilities Observed: Jul 14, 2026 Status: Confirmed ESIX©: 6.02  Full details and impact assessment on HackRisk.io

🚨Cyber Alert Update ‼️  🇯🇵Japan - 𝗡𝗶𝗵𝗼𝗻 𝗞𝗼𝘁𝘀𝘂  The AiLock ransomware group has claimed responsibility for the cyberattack against Nihon Kotsu, alleging on its dark web leak site that it exfiltrated 2.9 TB of data.  Japan’s largest taxi operator previously disclosed that the attack disrupted its dispatch, booking, reservation, and other internal systems.  Threat actor: AiLock Sector: Transportation / Storage Data exposure (claimed): 2.9 TB of data Data type: Not specified Observed: Jul 15, 2026 Status: Cyberattack confirmed; AiLock’s claims pending verification ESIX©: 7.96  Full details and impact assessment on HackRisk.io

🚨Cyber Alert [Fourth Update Nichirei Related]‼️  🇯🇵Japan - TableMark, Aeon and Kura Sushi  The Nichirei cyberattack continues to disrupt Japan’s food supply chain, affecting refrigerated warehouse operations and frozen food shipments.   In addition to KFC Japan, Hotto Motto and Yayoi Ken, TableMark, Aeon and Kura Sushi have also reported disruptions, including shortages, delivery delays, limited menus, suspended online ordering, and possible temporary store closures.   No recovery date has been announced.  Source: sankei.com/article/20260715-…  Full details and impact assessment on HackRisk.io

Status: Confirmed  Source: itmedia.co.jp/news/articles/…  Full details and impact assessment on HackRisk.io

llm_summary:
🤖 [GEMINI 분석] 2026-07-17 07:57 KST

### 1. 현재 주요 사이버보안 트렌드
최근 사이버 위협은 AI 기술을 악용한 공격과 공급망 취약점을 겨냥한 정교한 캠페인이 주를 이루고 있습니다. 특히, AI 모델의 보안 필터를 우회하기 위한 'text salting' 기법이 100만 건 이상의 피싱 메일에 활용되고 있으며([DarkReading](https://www.darkreading.com/threat-intelligence/1m-emails-hidden-text-dupe-ai-security-filters)), macOS 환경을 겨냥한 ClickLock과 같은 정보 탈취형 악성코드가 사용자 비밀번호 입력을 유도하는 등 공격 기법이 고도화되고 있습니다([BleepingComputer](https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-clicklock-macos-malware-traps-users-into-revealing-login-password/)). 또한, 기업 내 AI 인프라 구축 속도에 비해 보안 거버넌스가 미흡하여 이를 노린 자동화된 공격이 증가하고 있으며, OT 환경의 레거시 시스템 취약점 또한 여전히 주요 공격 접점으로 활용되고 있습니다([SecurityWeek](https://www.securityweek.com/legacy-systems-real-world-impacts-the-reality-of-ot-security/)).

### 2. 주요 위협 행위자 / 캠페인
- **Scattered Spider**: TfL(Transport for London) 해킹 사건의 주범인 Owen Flowers와 Thalha Jubair가 각각 5.5년형을 선고받음([TheHackerNews](https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/two-scattered-spider-hackers-get-55.html)).
- **Cavern Manticore**: 이란 연계 APT 그룹으로, 모듈형 C2 프레임워크를 사용하여 이스라엘 등을 타겟으로 활동([Check Point Research](https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/cavern-manticore-exposing-iran-linked-modular-c2-framework/)).
- **HelloNet**: ViPNet 업데이트 시스템을 악용하여 러시아 대형 조직을 타겟으로 한 악성 모듈 유포 캠페인([Securelist](https://securelist.com/tr/hellonet-vipnet/120700/)).
- **GoSerpent**: 동남아시아 정부 기관을 대상으로 데이터 수집 및 유출을 수행하는 백도어 캠페인([Securelist](https://securelist.com/goserpent-backdoor-in-southeast-asia/120687/)).
- **OkoBot**: 암호화폐 사용자를 타겟으로 시드 구문을 탈취하고 Chromium 기반 브라우저를 모니터링하는 악성 프레임워크([Securelist](https://securelist.com/okobot-framework-targets-cryptocurrency-wallets/120660/)).

### 3. 한국 관련 위협
- **오픈소스 서밋 코리아**: 8월 13~14일 서울 개최, AI 및 클라우드 보안 기술 공유 예정([데일리시큐](https://www.dailysecu.com/news/articleView.html?idxno=207655)).
- **기업연계 초청연수**: KISA와 KISIA가 정보보호의 날을 맞아 국내 기업의 해외 판로 개척 지원([데일리시큐](https://www.dailysecu.com/news/articleView.html?idxno=207653)).
- **피싱 공격**: 국세 당국을 사칭하여 원격제어 악성코드를 유포하는 피싱 메일 주의보([이스트시큐리티 알약](https://blog.alyac.co.kr/5771)).

### 4. 주요 CVE / 취약점
- **CVE-2026-48282**: Adobe ColdFusion, CVSS 10.0, 패치 직후 적극 악용 중([Twitter](https://twitter.com/boss_sec_labo/status/2077884710307627427#m)).
- **CVE-2026-15409**: SonicWall SMA1000, CVSS 10.0, 대규모 악용 중([Twitter](https://twitter.com/DefusedCyber/status/2077696589179584750#m)).
- **CVE-2026-59117**: Microsoft Windows, 심각도 높음, 악용 가능성 제기([Twitter](https://twitter.com/vuldb/status/2077886297822363995#m)).
- **CVE-2026-48343**: Adobe Bridge, CVSS 7.8, 임의 코드 실행 가능([Twitter](https://twitter.com/DFIR_Lab/status/2077885309702775184#m)).
- **CVE-2026-48342**: Adobe Bridge, CVSS 7.8, 정수 오버플로우로 인한 코드 실행([Twitter](https://twitter.com/DFIR_Lab/status/2077880268669530380#m)).

### 5. IOC 요약
- **도메인**: 없음
- **해시**: 없음
- **CVE**: CVE-2026-15409 ([Twitter](https://twitter.com/DefusedCyber/status/2077696589179584750#m)), CVE-2026-48282 ([Twitter](https://twitter.com/boss_sec_labo/status/2077884710307627427#m)), CVE-2026-48343 ([Twitter](https://twitter.com/DFIR_Lab/status/2077885309702775184#m))

### 6. 즉각 대응 권고
- **SonicWall SMA1000 및 Adobe ColdFusion**: 최신 보안 패치를 즉시 적용하고, 외부 노출 여부를 점검하여 비정상적인 접근 시도를 차단하십시오.
- **피싱 메일 대응**: 국세청 등 공공기관을 사칭한 메일 내 링크 클릭 및 첨부파일 실행을 금지하고, EDR 솔루션을 통해 원

📈 세션 누적: 14,665 / 1,000,000 (1.5%) | 세션 잔여 추정 985,335개

news_articles.title: Two Scattered Spider Hackers Get 5.5 Years Each for £29 Million TfL Hack
news_articles.summary:
Owen Flowers, 18, and Thalha Jubair, 20, were each sentenced to five and a half years at Woolwich Crown Court on Thursday, 16 July 2026, for the 2024 hack of Transport for London.

The attack left 148 TfL systems inoperable and forced all 27,000 of the transport authority's employees into an office

news_articles.title: ThreatsDay: Game Cheat Spyware, 24-Hour Ransomware, Chrome Sync Stalking + 12 More Stories
